page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m1 server family. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 4 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per CPU core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, meaning storage and external networking must be provisioned separately. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, though the processor lacks support for advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and hardware-assisted cryptography (AES, SHA_NI).

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.m1.medium offers a standard resource density suitable for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of specialized hardware accelerators. Due to the balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and the absence of local storage or GPUs, this instance is best suited for general-purpose applications, basic web serving, lightweight database hosting, and development or testing environments that do not rely on vector-heavy mathematical computations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is a general-purpose virtual machine instance within the ecs.m1 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor on an x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 4 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external block storage configuration. Lacking advanced CPU instruction sets like AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration, the hardware is designed for standard execution paths. This dedicated resource profile offers a balanced, qualitative cost-to-resource ratio for workloads that require consistent CPU performance without shared-core multi-tenant interference. It is appropriate for general-purpose applications, standard web servers, and development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and KVM virtualization, designed for balanced workloads without local storage.
